title: luzula glabrata var. parviflora
intro: Luzula glabrata var. parviflora, also known as dwarf woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Luzula glabrata var. parviflora are believed to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Luzula glabrata var. parviflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
